onboarding.consentTitle: Soma obwewozi bwo, ku ssimu yo
onboarding.consentBody: BorrowWise esoma obubaka bwa MoKash ne Wewole ku ssimu eno okulaga buli bwewozi bwe bugula ddala, n'okukulabula nga tonnaba kubanjibwa nnyo. Tewali kiweebwayo awatali kukkiriza kwo.

loan.repaymentsHint: By'osasudde, n'ebisigadde oluvannyuma lwa buli kusasula.
loan.thinkTwiceBody: Ekiwabyo kino kya muwendo gwa waggulu era kiva eri omuwozi atali ku lukalala lwa layisinsi lwa UMRA.

Stable.headline: Oli mu mbeera nnungi
Stable.nudge: Okusasula kwo kulabika nga kusoboka. Weewoze byokka by'osobola okusasula.

Emerging Risk.headline: Obubonero bw'akabi akajja
Emerging Risk.nudge: Ebibanja byo byeyongera. Lowooza ku kulekera awo okwewola okuggya nga obwewozi obukyaliwo obunnamu.

High Risk.headline: Akabi ak'okubanjibwa ennyo
High Risk.nudge: Okutwala obwewozi buno kuyinza okukusukka ku ky'osobola okusasula. Yogera n'omuwozi wo nga tonnaba kwongera kwewola.

settings.title: Enteekateeka
settings.appLockDesc: Saba olunwe oba PIN okuggulawo app
settings.contribution: Omugaso gwo eri okuwola okwa mirembe

safer.sub: Puleesa ya mazima — naye obwewozi bwa muwendo gwa waggulu obwa wiiki bbiri buyinza okukuzikiriza. Engeri ennungi olubereberye:

licensed.d: Afugibwa UMRA/BoU ku miwendo egiriko ekkomo.

sacco.d: Emiwendo gya bammemba, era tewali kujooga.

less.d: UGX 100k mu nnaku 7 kya bbeeyi ntono okusinga 200k mu nnaku 30.

wait.d: N'ennaku 3 ziyinza okuleeta omusaala oba engeri ya bbeeyi ntono.

mokash.d: Okutuuka ku UGX 250,000 · ~9% · kuba *165#. Sasula mu nnaku 30, si 14.

sacco.d: Omuwendo gwa bammemba, era bakulinda singa weekedde.

tc.lede: Ogenda kukkiriza app y'obwewozi? Teeka wano ebiragiro byayo nange nkulaga buli kabi mu lulimi olwangu.
tc.placeholder: Teeka wano ebiragiro bya app y'obwewozi…
tc.stubNote: Kukebera kwa kulabirako. Ekituufu kisoma ebiragiro bya app ne kibyekenneenya na AI.

result.summary: Obwewozi buno bugula nga 30% buli wiiki — okusukka 300% mu mwaka. Buyinza okutwala ennamba n'ebifaananyi byo, okuggya ssente ku MoMo awatali kubuuza, n'okugabana ebikukwatako ne 'bakolagana nabo'. Tobukkiriza.

f1.w: Kiba nga 320,000 okuzzaayo ku bwewozi bwa 200,000 mu wiiki bbiri — waggulu nnyo ku kkomo ettereke.

f2.c: Owa olukusa ku bannamu bo, ebyayogerwako n'ebifaananyi
f2.w: Bukozesebwa okukujooga n'okukuswaza (n'ab'omu maka go) bw'okerera.

f3.c: Okkiriza okuggyibwako ssente mu ngeri ey'okwekolera ku MoMo
f3.w: Basobola okuggyako ssente buli lwe wabaawo, ne ez'emmere oba obupangisa.

f4.c: Ebikukwatako biyinza okugabanibwa n'abantu abalala 'abakolagana nabo'
f4.w: Obwannannyini bwo n'obwewozi bugula awatali kukkiriza kwa nnamaddala.

score.builtTitle: Kizimbiddwa okuva ku ssimu yo — mu kyama
score.privacy: Empeera eno yiyo. Ezimbiddwa ku ssimu yo okuva ku byafaayo byo eby'ensimbi za MoMo — abawozi tebagiraba okuggyako nga ggwe okugabana.

safe.incomeSub: eziyingira ne zisigala, nga tugeraageranyizza emyezi 3
safe.canBorrow: Osobola okwewola awatali kabi okutuuka ku
safe.at: mu nnaku ~30, ku muwendo omutuufu wansi wa {{pct}}%
safe.lay: Mu ngeri ennyangu: kino kikuuma ebisasulwa wansi w'ekitundu kya kusatu eky'enfuna yo — n'osobola okusasula emmere, obupangisa n'airtime. Bw'owola okusingawo weeteeka mu kabi.

chat.greeting: Oli otya — nze Sente. Mbuuza kyonna ku bwewozi oba ssente zo, tewali kunenya. Nkuyambe ntya?
chat.rescueOpener: Nakuyimirizza nga tonnaba kuyingira {{app}}. Weetaaga ssente ku ki? Tewali kunenya — ka tunoonye engeri ennungi. 🤝

reply.greeting: Ndi wano. Mbuulira ekikuluma ku ssente nange nnaakuyamba — tewali kunenya.
reply.askAmount: Nkuwulira — puleesa eno ya mazima. Weetaaga ssente mmeka, era ddi?
reply.recommend: Weebale. Okusinziira ku ssente ezijja ku ssimu yo, osobola okutwala obwewozi obutono obw'ekiseera ekimpi. Wano waliwo ebifo ebirungi okusinga app etalina layisinsi:
reply.afford: Kuuma ebisasulwa wansi w'ekitundu kya kusatu eky'enfuna yo eya buli mwezi — ku byafaayo byo kino kiba nga UGX 220,000 mu nnaku 30 ku muwendo omutuufu. Oyagala nkulage ekigyamu?
reply.licensed: Abawozi abalina layisinsi bali ku lukalala lwa UMRA / Bank of Uganda — emiwendo giriko ekkomo, tewali kujooga. Za app ezitalina layisinsi zitera okusaba 60%+ ne zitwala bannamu bo. Mbuulira app nange nkukebera.

understand.headline: Wawola {{amount}}. Ojja kusasula {{repay}} — ekyo {{extra}} eby'enyongeza mu nnaku {{days}}.
understand.perDay: Kiba nga UGX {{perDay}} buli lunaku by'osasula okukwata ssente eno.
understand.late: Bw'osubwa olunaku, ebibonerezo biyinza okwongera mangu — emirundi mingi okusinga amagoba gennyini.
understand.early: Bw'osasula amangu osigaza singa — tewali mpeera ya kulwawo.
understand.coach: Toli mubi ku ssente — okumanya omuwendo omutuufu kwe kukukuuma mu buyinza. 👏

danger.title: Linda — {{app}} eyinza okukutega
danger.f1: Amagoba amanene aga buli lunaku ageeyongera mangu
danger.understandSub: Yogera ne Sente — funa obwewozi obw'omutuufu

contrib.countSub: abawozi bakuumye abalala omwezi guno — oli omu ku bo
contrib.sentSub: Tewali kiva ku ssimu yo nga tonnyinza kukwata. Ggwe oli mu buyinza.
contrib.share1: Muwendo gwokka — okugeza "obubonero 12 ku Ezee Credit, Kampala"
contrib.share2: Okwolesebwa okusinziira ku disitulikiti — tewali mannya, bubaka, oba bwewozi
contrib.share3: Bikuŋŋaanyizibwa n'enkumi → Bank of Uganda ne UMRA
contrib.privacy: Obwannannyini bwo, SMS zo n'obwewozi bwo tebiva ku ssimu — muwendo gwokka ogutalina mannya gwe guvaayo.

banned.title: App y'obwewozi ey'akabi eri ku ssimu yo
banned.reason: Teri ku lukalala lwa layisinsi lwa UMRA — za app nga zino ziyinza okukutega mu bbanja, ebisale ebikwekeddwa n'okujooga.
